response.justification: Bogdan has extensive backend and distributed systems expertise, particularly with event-driven architectures and real-time systems. However, his direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in production, especially within fintech or regulated environments, is unclear. His leadership and team-scaling experience is limited to smaller teams or consultancy roles, and there is no clear evidence of working with foundation models or agentic frameworks at scale. His fintech integration experience is also minimal.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise (event streaming, microservices, Docker, Linux)
Experience with real-time systems and low-latency applications (e.g., Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to design and maintain scalable, event-driven platforms (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: Limited direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in production environments
No clear track record scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal exposure to fintech-specific domains (credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance) or regulated environments
